calendar.matters:
Quiet Title In Scd
Off Calendar Oct-18-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up/Quiet Title Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rhonda Fung.
Andrew Schwarts, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco Redevelopment Agency.
After hearing the evidence presented, memo. of points and authorities in support, and stipulations filed, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: All Persons claiming any interest in, or lien upon, the real property.
See scanned doc. for details of Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.

Quiet Title In Scd
Off Calendar Sep-19-2005 Continued To Oct-18-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

Quiet Title In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-18-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No Appearance, the matter is continued to September 19, 2005 per Cout order at Plaintiff's request.
Comm. Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: M. Vallejo, Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley CSR 225

Quiet Title In Scd.
